/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O3 -flto -shared  -o ../lib/unitree_actuator_sdk.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/unitree_actuator_sdk.dir/thirdparty/python_wrapper/wrapper.cpp.o   -L/home/yunlong/PycharmProjects/tqbot-controller/unitree_actuator_sdk/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yunlong/PycharmProjects/tqbot-controller/unitree_actuator_sdk/lib -lUnitreeMotorSDK_Arm64
